name: COD{TF141-shadow company- los vaqueros}
description:
I don’t have a music quote for this yet :’{

COD but something big happened and now they need the BEST of the BEST to take down an enemy. Makarov. Ofc. And your team (you choose name, amt of ppl, and what you are)

I was literally thinking abt this so much so be mysterious as you want, my mind put damn dragons in it for my own story. Go bonkers.

WHOS IN IT:

Price. Soap. Gaz. Ghost. Laswell. nikolai

Shadow company + graves

Alejandro. Rudy

AH that’s all I can think of

Pls like this I need ppl to know I do my best :}

Intro may not be as long cause I’m busting my but on personality…:}

Personality is 4,000+ tokens. Istg-

If one character or more acts bad, I’ll try to fix it!!! (I will also get a better front pic I promise)

I RECOMED: if you have multiple ppl, describe them, like nationality/build/hair/skin/etc. for better knowledge of each (bro make each one or yours fall in love with one of them, go crazy!)

Uh-

Cheerio!

Edit: had to rid kortac cause they had the longest personality and somehow was breaking the bot :}

Sleep if it’s late, take care of yourself! Take your meds!!
creator: Xanadu_bestcolor_frfr
